title: [HWArith][LowerHWArithToHW] "null operand found" when lowering in `msft.module`
body:
```mlir
// RUN: circt-opt -lower-hwarith-to-hw %s

msft.module @AddInts {} (%a: ui32, %b: ui32) -> (c: ui33) {
  %0 = hwarith.add %a, %b : (ui32, ui32) -> ui33
  msft.output %0 : ui33
}
```

```
test.mlir:3:5: error: null operand found
    msft.output %0 : ui33
    ^
test.mlir:3:5: note: see current operation: "msft.output"(<<NULL VALUE>>) : (<<NULL TYPE>>) -> ()
```

I'm pretty sure this [section of code](https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/3965f68d8c4633ee3de0db29645699277ce5352d/lib/Conversion/HWArithToHW/HWArithToHW.cpp#L524), which I'm pretty sure is the problem. Ideally, hwarith operations would be lowerable anywhere as well as [un]signed ports on any module.
